subtitle: You can complete the basic onboarding first. Platform and chat provider setup can both be skipped.

onboard.title: Quick Onboarding
onboard.subtitle: Complete initialization directly on the welcome page.
onboard.step0Desc: Configure the backend API URL for AstrBot.
onboard.step1Desc: Connect AstrBot to IM platforms like QQ, Lark, Slack, Telegram, etc.
onboard.step3Desc: Set whether the agent can access and use the current computer.
onboard.step3HelpItem1: The agent will be able to access workspace directories (each user's workspace is isolated) and use Skills to perform more complex tasks.
onboard.step3HelpItem2: For AstrBot administrators, the agent is additionally allowed to execute Shell commands, Python code, and access all local directories.
onboard.step3HelpItem3: For more granular permission and capability configuration, go to Config File -> General Config -> Computer Use to continue.
onboard.providerUpdateFailed: Failed to update default chat provider in config file "default"
onboard.providerDefaultUpdated: Default chat provider in config file "default" has been set to {id}

resources.title: Resources
resources.afdianDesc: Support the AstrBot team on Afdian.
